# targetSide

**Instance Property**

The target location for the new item.

## Declaration

```swift
var targetSide: NSFileProviderTestingOperationSide { get }
```

## Accessing the Operation’s Data

- **sourceItem**: A description of the item stored at the source.
- **domainVersion**: The domain’s version when the system discovered the item at the source location.
